issue.title: 10.com.au

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://10.com.au/race-across-the-world](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Frace-across-the-world) ### Comment > When I enable the AdBlock on 10Play, I'm met with this ''Unexpected Error" which prevents the videos from playing. Also, when I turn off AdBlock I have no issue playing videos which leads me to believe that it isn't something external causing the issue. This problem is the same for all videos on the site. I've also ensured my VPN is turned off as that can sometimes cause issues. > > Hopefully it can be fixed and thankyou for the otherwise highly effective online tool! :) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/f417y0ea6g8o4oc08sgggs88k0ccw8gk8xndhzbyhw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.31 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-04-13T08:00:41 Tracking protection: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Shazam` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.31&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-04-13T08%3A00%3A41)
